title: Rebuilding the checkout experience
problem: The legacy checkout lost roughly a third of buyers between the cart and the confirmation screen. Long forms, unclear errors and a full page reload on every step made the flow feel slow and fragile on mobile.
solution: We rebuilt checkout as a single page with saved details, inline validation and a persistent order summary. Payment and address steps collapse into one view, and every field validates as the shopper types.
result: Conversion from cart to purchase rose sharply within the first month, and support tickets about failed payments dropped by half. The new flow also loads in a fraction of the time on mobile.
